text.title: LB Layer Selection Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the layer-decision-record this methodology produces. Validator enforces consistency between layer and feature list.

example.code: { "protocol": "https", "layer": "L7", "tls_strategy": "terminate-at-lb", "features": ["path-routing", "header-routing", "waf"], "rationale": "HTTPS with path-based routing + WAF integration → L7 required. TLS terminates at the LB to enable WAF and inline header rewrites." }
{ "protocol": "tcp", "layer": "L4", "tls_strategy": "terminate-at-lb", "features": ["path-routing", "header-routing"], "rationale": "use L4 for performance and then route by /api path" }

forbidden.pattern: layer == L4 AND (features contains path-routing OR header-routing OR cookie-sticky OR waf OR api-gateway)
